prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学上海医学院为985、211、双一流高校，依托复旦大学（软科2026年主榜第5名）的顶尖学术平台， 临床医学为A级学科，属于全国医学院校第一梯队，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年复旦大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与学校管理类事件，但未出 现投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度维持高位；临床医学（A级）、公共卫生与预防医学（A+）、护理学（A-）、 药学（A）、基础医学（A-）等均为A类学科，学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业2024-2026年持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；护 理学专业获推荐评级，人才紧缺；药学专业热度平稳。吉林省2026年高考总人数约110868人，较2025年（111492人）基本持平；物理类考生估算约80047人，较2025年（80421人） 略减，竞争压力略有缓解。；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，属一线城市，对吉林省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在吉林省招生 占比约1.5%-3.1%（2025年约1.5%），属于外省招生占比较小的顶尖医学院，名额稀缺性推高竞争。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023 (Science), the minimum ranking was approximately 134 → 163 → 126. After the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, the Physics Category ranking significantly dropped to 766, and further dropped to 821 in 2025. The ranking has shown a clear downward trend in the past two years, with a baseline of about 821 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province Physics Category: 4 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 10 in 2024, slightly decreased to 9 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 10 students, a small expansion of about 11% compared to 2025. The increase in enrollment slots slightly eases competition, leading to a tendency for rankings to drop further.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, relying on Fudan University's top-tier academic platform (ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking). Clinical Medicine is an A-level discipline, belonging to the first tier of national medical schools, strongly attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, Fudan University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents, but no abnormal signals in admission cutoffs have appeared. Douyin popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high attention for applications. Clinical Medicine (A-level), Public Health and Preventive Medicine (A+), Nursing (A-), Pharmacy (A), and Basic Medicine (A-) are all A-class disciplines, with top-tier national academic strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine has been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social application heat. Nursing has received a recommended rating, with a talent shortage. Pharmacy has stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of Jilin Province college entrance exam takers is about 110,868, roughly the same as 2025 (111,492). Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 80,047, slightly fewer than 2025 (80,421), easing competition pressure slightly. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Jilin Province candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5%-3.1% (about 1.5% in 2025), making it a top medical school with a small out-of-province enrollment share, and the scarcity of slots drives up competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical downward trend in rankings, the small expansion in 2026, the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates, the top-tier level of the university, and the high popularity of Clinical Medicine, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to drop slightly from the 2025 baseline of 821. The predicted minimum ranking is about 866, with a range of 762-970.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year program) (Eight-Year Clinical Physician Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program) (Including Outstanding Clinical Physician Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Pharmacy (Including Pharmacy Top Talent Class, Pharmacy Industry-Education Integration Class)
- Preventive Medicine (5-year program) (Including Preventive Medicine Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nursing (Including Nursing Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (762-970), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 Nursing as a safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<762), you can focus on aiming for Clinical Medicine (8-year program). If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>970), it is recommended to choose Nursing as a safe option.
